name: Iter19 — Confetti and excellence banner appear when review score is 90 or above
description: When a PR receives a quality score of 90 or above, the review report displays the gold Excellent Code Quality banner and a confetti animation. Use a well-written, minimal PR that is likely to score high.

planSteps.description: Type https://github.com/sindresorhus/is/pull/1 into the PR input field
Click the Analyze PR button and wait for the review to complete
Verify the review report is visible with a numeric score
If the score shown is 90 or above, verify a gold or yellow excellence banner with text like 'Excellent Code Quality' is visible below the score
If the score shown is 90 or above, verify colorful confetti elements are visible on screen during or after the result renders
